documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Bm SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-bm
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common bm
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.bm_client.BmClient.RepairTaskControl
documentation:
此接口用于操作维修任务\
入参TaskId为维修任务ID\
入参Operate表示对维修任务的操作，支持如下取值：\
AuthorizeRepair（授权维修）\
Ignore（暂不提醒）\
ConfirmRecovered（维修完成后，确认故障恢复）\
ConfirmUnRecovered（维修完成后，确认故障未恢复，该操作已不推荐用）\
NeedRepairAgain（维修完成后，故障未恢复，需要重新维修，推荐用此操作打回）\
入参OperateRemark仅在Operate为NeedRepairAgain时有效，表示打回重修原因，建议给出打回的具体原因。\
\
操作约束（当前任务状态(TaskStatus)->对应可执行的操作）：\
未授权(1)->授权维修；暂不处理\
暂不处理(4)->授权维修\
待确认(3)->确认故障恢复；确认故障未恢复；需要重新维修\
未恢复(6)->确认故障恢复\
\
对于Ping不可达故障的任务，还允许：\
未授权->确认故障恢复\
暂不处理->确认故障恢复\
\
处理中与已恢复状态的任务不允许进行操作。\
\
详细信息请访问： ``` param request Request instance for RepairTaskControl. type request rtype ```

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.InstanceId
documentation:
设备的唯一ID
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.Password
documentation:
密码。 用户设置的linux root或Windows Administrator密码。密码校验规则: \<li> Windows机器密码需12到16位，至少包括三项 `[a-z]`,\`[A-Z]\`,\`[0-9]\`和\`\[()\`'`` ~!@#$%^&*-+=_`|`{}[]:;'<>,.?/]`的特殊符号, 密码不能包含Administrator(不区分大小写); <li> Linux机器密码需8到16位，至少包括两项`[a-z,A-Z] ``,\`[0-9]\`和\`\[()\`'<mailto:~!@#$%^&*>-+=\_\`|\`{}\[\]:;'\<>,.?/\]\`的特殊符号
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.OsTypeId
documentation:
操作系统类型ID。通过接口\[查询操作系统信息(DescribeOsInfo)\](<https://cloud.tencent.com/document/api/386/32902>)获取操作系统信息
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.RaidId
documentation:
RAID类型ID。通过接口\[查询机型RAID方式以及系统盘大小(DescribeDeviceClassPartition)\](<https://cloud.tencent.com/document/api/386/32910>)获取RAID信息
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.IsZoning
documentation:
是否格式化数据盘。0: 不格式化（默认值）；1：格式化
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.SysRootSpace
documentation:
系统盘根分区大小，默认是10G。系统盘的大小参考接口\[查询机型RAID方式以及系统盘大小(DescribeDeviceClassPartition)\](<https://cloud.tencent.com/document/api/386/32910>)
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.SysSwaporuefiSpace
documentation:
系统盘swap分区或/boot/efi分区的大小。若是uefi启动的机器，分区为/boot/efi ,且此值是默认是2G。普通机器为swap分区，可以不指定此分区。机型是否是uefi启动，参考接口\[查询设备型号(DescribeDeviceClass)\](<https://cloud.tencent.com/document/api/386/32911>)
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.SysUsrlocalSpace
documentation:
/usr/local分区大小
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.VpcId
documentation:
重装到新的私有网络的ID。如果改变VPC子网，则要求与SubnetId同时传参，否则可不填
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.SubnetId
documentation:
重装到新的子网的ID。如果改变VPC子网，则要求与VpcId同时传参，否则可不填
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.LanIp
documentation:
重装指定IP地址
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.HyperThreading
documentation:
指定是否开启超线程。 0：关闭超线程；1：开启超线程（默认值）
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.ImageId
documentation:
自定义镜像ID。传此字段则用自定义镜像重装
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.FileSystem
documentation:
指定数据盘的文件系统格式，当前支持 EXT4和XFS选项， 默认为EXT4。 参数适用于数据盘和Linux， 且在IsZoning为1时生效
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.NeedSecurityAgent
documentation:
是否安装安全Agent，取值：1(安装) 0(不安装)，默认取值0
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.NeedMonitorAgent
documentation:
是否安装监控Agent，取值：1(安装) 0(不安装)，默认取值0
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.NeedEMRAgent
documentation:
是否安装EMR Agent，取值：1(安装) 0(不安装)，默认取值0
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.NeedEMRSoftware
documentation:
是否安装EMR软件包，取值：1(安装) 0(不安装)，默认取值0
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.ReserveSgConfig
documentation:
是否保留安全组配置，取值：1(保留) 0(不保留)，默认取值0
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.bm.v20180423.models.ReloadDeviceOsRequest.SysDataSpace
documentation:
/data分区大小，可不填。除root、swap、usr/local的剩余空间会自动分配到data分区
\:rtype: int
ReloadDeviceOs请求参数结构体
